subject: A tall mustachioed humanoid in a long coat uses blue magic on a kneeling cowering creature in a gothic hall, watched by a crowd of onlookers
description: In the foreground of a grand arched gothic hall, a tall humanoid figure in a long golden-brown coat and dark waistcoat extends one hand projecting swirling blue magical energy toward a smaller reptilian or lizard-like creature that cowers on the floor. The humanoid's other arm is raised, and circular blue lens devices are mounted on the coat. A crowd of varied figures watches from the background — including what appears to be a minotaur, shorter humanoids, and cloaked onlookers. The scene reads as an interrogation or public accusation. Blue-purple lighting dominates the hall.
foreground: tall humanoid figure in long coat casting blue magic at a cowering creature
background: gothic arched hall with crowd of onlookers
emotion: authoritarian intimidation — power pressed down on the powerless
